user.title: Connect to PositionGuard
user.description: Enter your API key to continue. See {docs_url} for how to obtain a key.

groups.title: Select groups
groups.description: Found {group_count} group(s) on your account. Pick which to integrate.

error.invalid_format: API key must start with pg_live_

error.no_groups: Your account has no groups. Create one in the PositionGuard iOS app first.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to reach PositionGuard. Try again later.
